name: EchoPark Automotive Grand Prix
comments: Tyler Reddick has won the EchoPark Automotive Grand Prix at the Circuit of The Americas, his fourth career victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason indicated: Nos. 34 (unapproved adjustments).
